Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Foxfire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Foxfire is an illusion of flame that produces no actual heat but causes the agony of real fire upon touching flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Foxfire is purple and white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei and Kazan Jade elders summoned foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Jade experts used foxfire in combat.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Kelsa wove her madra into Foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon can conjure purple flickering Foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Foxfire is a technique used in combat.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Kelsa's Goldsign is a fox’s tail of purple-white foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Kelsa's tail is associated with Foxfire.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa uses Foxfire in the form of tiny purple-white fireballs.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
